articles.title: Zenken boosts a lean sales team with ChatGPT Enterprise
articles.summary: Zenken, a company with a lean sales team, has adopted ChatGPT Enterprise to enhance its sales capabilities. This integration is expected to boost efficiency and productivity, allowing the team to focus on high-value tasks. By leveraging ChatGPT's advanced language model, Zenken aims to streamline sales processes and drive business growth.

articles.title: OpenAI and SoftBank Group partner with SB Energy
articles.summary: OpenAI and SoftBank Group have partnered with SB Energy to accelerate the development of renewable energy solutions. This collaboration aims to leverage AI technology to optimize energy production and reduce costs. The partnership is expected to drive innovation in the renewable energy sector, promoting a more sustainable future.

articles.title: Datadog uses Codex for system-level code review
articles.summary: Datadog has integrated Codex, an AI-powered code review tool, to enhance its system-level code review process, aiming to improve code quality and reduce errors. This innovative approach leverages AI to automate code reviews, freeing up developers to focus on more complex tasks. By adopting Codex, Datadog is streamlining its development workflow and promoting more efficient collaboration among its engineering teams.

articles.title: Netomi’s lessons for scaling agentic systems into the enterprise
articles.summary: Netomi, a leading AI-powered customer service platform, shares valuable lessons on scaling agentic systems into large enterprises, highlighting the importance of seamless integration and adaptability. By leveraging AI-driven automation, companies can enhance customer experience and streamline operations. Netomi's expertise provides a roadmap for businesses to successfully implement and scale AI-powered solutions.

articles.title: OpenAI for Healthcare
articles.summary: OpenAI is expanding into the healthcare sector, leveraging its AI capabilities to improve patient outcomes and streamline clinical workflows. This innovative application of AI has the potential to revolutionize healthcare by enabling more accurate diagnoses, personalized treatment plans, and enhanced patient care. By integrating OpenAI into healthcare systems, medical professionals can tap into a wealth of data-driven insights to inform their decision-making.

articles.title: Veo 3.1 Ingredients to Video: More consistency, creativity and control
articles.summary: Veo 3.1 introduces significant updates to its video creation platform, enhancing consistency, creativity, and control for users. The new version offers improved features, allowing for more seamless and personalized video production. This upgrade empowers creators to produce high-quality content with greater ease and precision.

articles.title: Google's year in review: 8 areas with research breakthroughs in 2025
articles.summary: Google's 2025 year in review highlights 8 key areas with significant research breakthroughs, showcasing advancements in AI, machine learning, and other emerging technologies. These innovations have the potential to drive major impacts in fields such as healthcare, sustainability, and accessibility. From improved language models to enhanced computer vision, Google's research efforts are pushing the boundaries of what's possible with technology.

articles.title: Gemini 3 Flash: frontier intelligence built for speed
articles.summary: Gemini 3 Flash is a cutting-edge intelligence platform designed for exceptional speed, enabling faster decision-making and response times. This innovative technology is built to process vast amounts of data quickly, making it a game-changer for industries that rely on rapid insights. With Gemini 3 Flash, users can expect enhanced performance and accelerated intelligence capabilities.

articles.title: Gemma Scope 2: helping the AI safety community deepen understanding of complex language model behavior
articles.summary: The Gemma Scope 2 tool has been introduced to aid the AI safety community in better understanding complex language model behavior, enabling deeper analysis and insight into AI decision-making. This innovation has the potential to improve AI safety and reliability by providing a more comprehensive understanding of language models. By shedding light on AI behavior, Gemma Scope 2 can help mitigate risks and develop more trustworthy AI systems.

articles.title: Improved Gemini audio models for powerful voice experiences
articles.summary: Google has enhanced its Gemini audio models, enabling more accurate and efficient voice recognition for a range of applications. This upgrade allows for improved speech-to-text capabilities, paving the way for more powerful voice experiences across various devices and platforms. With Gemini, users can expect more seamless and intuitive voice interactions, revolutionizing the way we interact with technology.

articles.title: NVIDIA Cosmos Reason 2 Brings Advanced Reasoning To Physical AI
articles.summary: NVIDIA has unveiled Cosmos Reason 2, a cutting-edge AI platform that enables advanced reasoning in physical environments, allowing robots and machines to better understand and interact with their surroundings. This innovation has the potential to revolutionize industries such as manufacturing, healthcare, and logistics by enhancing the capabilities of physical AI systems. With Cosmos Reason 2, NVIDIA is pushing the boundaries of AI-powered robotics and autonomous systems.

articles.title: Introducing Falcon-H1-Arabic: Pushing the Boundaries of Arabic Language AI with Hybrid Architecture
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced Falcon-H1-Arabic, a groundbreaking AI model that utilizes a hybrid architecture to significantly improve Arabic language understanding and generation capabilities. This innovative approach combines the strengths of different AI techniques to achieve state-of-the-art results in Arabic language processing tasks. By pushing the boundaries of Arabic language AI, Falcon-H1-Arabic has the potential to enhance various applications, such as language translation and text summarization, for Arabic-speaking communities.

articles.title: NVIDIA brings agents to life with DGX Spark and Reachy Mini
articles.summary: NVIDIA has unveiled DGX Spark and Reachy Mini, innovative tools that bring agents to life by enabling the creation of interactive, AI-powered robots. The Reachy Mini is a compact, robotic platform that can be programmed to perform various tasks, while DGX Spark is a software framework that streamlines the development process. This breakthrough technology has the potential to revolutionize industries such as healthcare, education, and entertainment with interactive, autonomous agents.

articles.title: AprielGuard: A Guardrail for Safety and Adversarial Robustness in Modern LLM Systems
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced AprielGuard, a novel framework designed to enhance the safety and adversarial robustness of modern Large Language Models (LLMs). This innovative approach acts as a "guardrail" to detect and prevent potential hazards, such as toxic or misleading outputs, in LLM systems. By improving the reliability and trustworthiness of LLMs, AprielGuard has the potential to significantly impact the development of more secure and responsible AI technologies.

articles.title: Tokenization in Transformers v5: Simpler, Clearer, and More Modular
articles.summary: The latest Transformers v5 update introduces a revamped tokenization system, making it simpler, more modular, and easier to use. This change enables more efficient and flexible text processing, allowing developers to better customize and integrate tokenization into their natural language processing (NLP) models. The update aims to improve overall performance and accessibility of NLP tasks, such as language translation and text classification.

articles.title: vLLM large scale serving: DeepSeek 2.2k tok/s/h200 with wide-ep
articles.summary: DeepSeek has achieved a significant milestone in large-scale serving of very large language models (vLLMs), reaching 2.2k tokens per second per H200 with its wide-ep model. This breakthrough enables faster and more efficient processing of complex language tasks, paving the way for more widespread adoption of AI-powered applications. The innovation has the potential to revolutionize industries that rely on natural language processing, such as customer service and content generation.

articles.title: Show HN: OSS AI agent that indexes and searches the Epstein files
articles.summary: A new open-source AI agent has been developed to index and search the Epstein files, a large dataset of documents related to the Jeffrey Epstein case. This AI-powered tool enables users to quickly and efficiently search through the vast amount of information, potentially uncovering new connections and insights. By leveraging natural language processing and machine learning, the agent aims to facilitate a more in-depth understanding of the case and its complexities.

articles.title: Sei (YC W22) Is Hiring a DevOps Engineer (India/In-Office/Chennai/Gurgaon)
articles.summary: Sei, a Y Combinator-backed startup, is expanding its team and hiring a DevOps Engineer to join their offices in Chennai or Gurgaon, India. This role offers the opportunity to work on innovative projects and collaborate with a talented team. By joining Sei, the hired engineer will contribute to the company's growth and tech development.

articles.title: AI generated music barred from Bandcamp
articles.summary: Bandcamp has announced that it will no longer allow music generated by artificial intelligence (AI) on its platform, citing concerns over authorship and ownership. This move aims to protect human artists and ensure that music sold on the site is created by actual people, rather than machines. The decision highlights the growing debate over the role of AI in creative industries and the need for clear guidelines on AI-generated content.

articles.title: We can't have nice things because of AI scrapers
articles.summary: A recent discussion on Hacker News highlights the growing issue of AI-powered scrapers that exploit online content, threatening the livelihoods of creators and the quality of online information. These scrapers use AI to extract and replicate content, often without permission or credit, making it difficult for original authors to maintain control over their work. This phenomenon has significant implications for the future of online content creation and ownership.
